prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CONSTRUCTION-50PC-SET-HVAR Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Military Combat Existing Title: KidPlay 50pc Diecast Cars Urban City Construction Toys Play Set for Kids Description: The Construction Team Toy Set is a great addition to any kid's toy car collection. Each set comes with all of the construction vehicles and workers needed to rebuild and construct pretend towns: trucks, cars, a helicopter, construction workers and even a gas station.

Each set is constructed of Die Cast metal and durable plastic, and all of the vehicles feature free moving wheels. Kids will love zooming around pretend areas with these toy cars.

This is a great gift idea for young kids and toy car collectors alike.

Construct and rebuild pretend cities with the Construction Team Toy Set. Search Terms: urban city diecast cars construction toys boys kids toys Christmas gifts Hanukkah vehicle accessories learning toys semi truck accessories semi truck toy pretend play birthday dump truck cement mixer toy Features: - URBAN CITY CONSTRUCTION TOYS PLAYSET: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy city construction site with this construction toys 50pc play set! Offering an abundance of toy play choices from dump trucks to transport vans, your little one will love creating construction site and building scenarios with their friends - IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY: Your little construction manager can handle all the building site projects and mishaps, using the wide variety of trucks, vehicles and other accessories included with this play set! Their imaginary pretend play will spark constant creativity and new playtime adventures - PLAYTIME DURABILITY: The durable Diecast metal design provides an opportunity for both indoor and outdoor fun; Whether it is outside directing traffic, unloading supplies or pouring cement, this deluxe multi-piece urban city constructions toys play set will stand up to long days on the job site! - FUN LEARNING TOYS: Not only will your little builder be thrilled and occupied for hours with this constructions toys play set, they'll be developing crucial early critical thinking and problem-solving skills, as well as developing their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Multi; Material: Plastic, Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+; Assembly Required: No; Batteries Required: No === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
